concept: Create a racing game where vehicles automatically accelerate but players control an extendable hook that can latch onto the environment to navigate corners. Mastering the timing of hooking and releasing creates optimal racing lines through the gravity-defying tracks suspended in a massive vertical city. Vehicle upgrades focus on hook reach, grip strength, and handling while airborne between hook points. Competitors can tactically disrupt each other's hooks or temporarily steal attachment points, creating dynamic competitive gameplay. The championship takes place in a future society where this dangerous sport represents the only path to citizenship in an elite sky-dwelling civilization.
